prompt: Get me all the info on this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw

assertions.text: Output contains the video title 'Me at the zoo'
Output contains an upload date in YYYY-MM-DD format (2005-04-23)
Output contains a view count (numeric with commas or raw number)
Output uses structured formatting with labeled fields (e.g., 'Title:', 'Channel:', 'Views:' or markdown headers/bold)
